raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Set the bar","name":"What does good brand design look like at your level right now, Carlos?","description":"Surfaces his current mental model of quality and the standard he is using to judge his own work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Concrete examples","name":"Which recent piece of work best shows your current quality bar?","description":"Forces a specific artifact into view so the feedback can be grounded in real work rather than abstractions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback translated","name":"What changed in your day-to-day after the last round of feedback?","description":"Checks whether prior feedback became new behavior, process, or output rather than staying conceptual.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Quality misses","name":"Where do you think your work most often misses the bar?","description":"Names the recurring quality gap in a way that can lead to a concrete calibration discussion.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision points","name":"What choices are you making when the work gets less polished?","description":"Surfaces whether the issue is taste, time trade-offs, or a lack of criteria when quality slips.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Working definition","name":"How do you decide when a design is ready to ship?","description":"Reveals his internal threshold for done and whether it matches the team's expectation.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Learning friction","name":"What part of your growth feels blocked right now?","description":"Identifies the specific constraint on his near-term development so the next step can be practical.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Practice focus","name":"What one skill do you want to practice in the next few weeks?","description":"Narrows growth into a single near-term practice area that can be observed and coached.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback in action","name":"What would show you that this feedback is actually sticking?","description":"Makes the desired behavior change observable so follow-up can be concrete.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would you like to have changed by our next check-in?","description":"Closes on a specific commitment for the next cycle without opening a new topic.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
